---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Agent AKI
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open Agent AKI
2. Type '...' in the agent panel
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if applicable.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 14.5, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Agent AKI version**: (e.g., v0.1.0)
- **Board**: (e.g., ESP32-WROOM-32, Arduino Uno)
- **Node.js version**: (run `node --version`)

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem — serial output, build errors, screenshots.
